name: Artificer Bubblefruit Inflation
description:
50K CHATS LETS FUCKING GOOOOOOOO!!! Thank you all for all of these chats and chatters and stuff. I like the attention I like rain world I like inflation mm.

Rivuficer. Also, the artist of this is Shiyaa_stuff. They got the best Rain World art to goon to frfr🙏🙏🙏

Rivulet force-fed Artificer a handful of Bubblefruit's and boy things sure do happen. Also someone commented on this literally the minute it came out wtf.

Minor update 10: How the hell did I forget about the slugcat tag while making this? It's there now.

Update 9: forgor to add the <end> messages to the dialogs lol.

Update 8 (likely the final major update): After all this time, finally, I give you Gourmand (male). You can now fuck the dilf, or cook with him... Or lay down on him, I dunno. Cryo-optimism vs Pyrocynical who wins (pls don't tell me there's some guy out there named Cryo-optimism please bro 🥀 🥀 🥀). I also decided to add a couple of "<START>" messages to the example dialogs instead of just one. I'm not sure if it'll work, but I want to try.

I think the reason why this blew up so much is because Rivulet and Artificer are in the image, and because Riv and Arti are both popular among gooners. Either way, new scug yay.

Minor update: Extra intro so that you can start however you want. Nothing else.

Update after 6: Added an extra section to the Bubblefruits. Do note that the more permanent tokens (personality) I use, the less memory the bot has to work with.

Update 6: Added they/them Spearmaster finally. Now the question is whether or not people prefer fem Spears or male Spears?

Update 5: Added Rivulet example dialog, with {{user}} as Monk in the example. I found that the bot focused a little too much on Artificer even when it introduced Hunter in the middle of a chat and I wanted to leave, so I added some dialog to hopefully hammer in that other characters can speak and so that the bot doesn't revolve completely around Artificer. On a side note, what is proxy, what does it do, and how can I use it?

Update 4: Should I add vore? Finally added Hunter, and Enot (futa) and their egg as the wildcard, and I finished the egg too.

Update 3: added example dialogs at the request of a commenter. I generated one response that I liked.

Update 2: electric boogaloo: Added Sain't, I think. Let's see if I wrote him correctly or not.

Update 1: Added The Watcher (Shiyaa_stuff version because yes).
creator: Danl quesadilla
